mapper.select: SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, title, content, CASE WHEN notify_type = 'D3' THEN 'D-3' WHEN notify_type = 'D0' THEN 'D-DAY' END AS dday, is_read AS isRead FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_closed = 0 AND target_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY is_read ASC, target_date ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notifications ( user_id, subscription_id, notify_type, title, content, target_date, is_read, is_closed, created_at ) SELECT s.user_id, s.subscription_id,
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 3 THEN 'D3' WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 0 THEN 'D0' END AS notify_type,
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 3 THEN CONCAT(i.item_name, '의 구독이 곧 갱신돼요') WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 0 THEN CONCAT(i.item_name, ' 결제일이 오늘이에요') END AS title,
CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 3 THEN CONCAT(c.card_company, '로 결제될 예정이에요.') WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 0 THEN CONCAT(c.card_company, '로 오늘 결제 예정이에요.') END AS content,
calc.target_date, 0, 0, NOW()
FROM add_subscription s JOIN subscription_item i ON s.item_id = i.item_id JOIN payment_method pm ON s.payment_id = pm.payment_id JOIN card c ON pm.card_id = c.card_id
JOIN ( SELECT sub.subscription_id, CASE WHEN sub.billing_cycle = '1M' THEN CASE WHEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) MONTH ) <= sub.start_date THEN DATE_ADD(sub.start_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) MONTH ) >= CURDATE() THEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) MONTH ) ELSE DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL (TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) + 1) MONTH ) END
WHEN sub.billing_cycle = '1Y' THEN CASE WHEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) YEAR ) <= sub.start_date THEN DATE_ADD(sub.start_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) WHEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) YEAR ) >= CURDATE() THEN DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) YEAR ) ELSE DATE_ADD( sub.start_date, INTERVAL (TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, sub.start_date, CURDATE()) + 1) YEAR ) END END AS target_date FROM add_subscription sub WHERE sub.use_yn = 'Y' ) calc ON s.subscription_id = calc.subscription_id
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.use_yn = 'Y' AND DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) IN (3, 0) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notifications n WHERE n.user_id = s.user_id AND n.subscription_id = s.subscription_id AND n.notify_type = CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 3 THEN 'D3' WHEN DATEDIFF(calc.target_date, CURDATE()) = 0 THEN 'D0' END AND n.target_date = calc.target_date )
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND is_closed = 0
UPDATE notifications SET is_closed = 1 WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND is_closed = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND is_closed = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND is_closed = 0
